name: Git YOLO Linux
description: Bash function that commits current branch changes, updates main, rebases the branch onto main, fast-forwards main, and pushes using configured Git upstreams.
content:
git_yolo_main() {
  set -e
  branch="$(git branch --show-current)"
  if [ -z "$branch" ]; then
    echo "Not on a branch."
    return 1
  fi
  if [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then
    echo "Run this from a non-main branch."
    return 1
  fi

  if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then
    git add -A
    git commit -m "chore: yolo update"
  fi

  git fetch
  git switch main
  git pull --ff-only
  git switch "$branch"
  git rebase main
  git switch main
  git merge --ff-only "$branch"
  git push
  git switch "$branch"
  git status --short
}
